2112430.name: Mortie College
2112430.description:
Get through life in college. Help Mortie and his girlfriend Ashley who have just started college and are trying to fit in and learn what they are supposed to do. Make friends, study, and stay away from the bullies in this family-friendly visual novel.

Survive college
Avoid the bullies and study as hard as you can.

A good story
Go through a nice and simple story about friendship and life itself.

A family-friendly visual novel
This visual novel is family friendly and suitable for all ages.

Point and click
Point and click your way through this fun visual novel.
